detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Exchange.addLiquidity(uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256,address,uint256) (src/contracts/Exchange.sol#87-156):
	External call allowing reentrancy:
	- IERC20(baseToken).safeTransferFrom(msg.sender,address(this),tokenQtys.baseTokenQty) (src/contracts/Exchange.sol#127-131)
	Balance read before the call:
	- tokenQtys = MathLib.calculateAddLiquidityQuantities(_baseTokenQtyDesired,_quoteTokenQtyDesired,_baseTokenQtyMin,_quoteTokenQtyMin,IERC20(baseToken).balanceOf(address(this)),IERC20(quoteToken).balanceOf(address(this)),this.totalSupply(),internalBalances) (src/contracts/Exchange.sol#97-107)
	Possible stale balance used after the call in a condition:
	- require(bool,string)(IERC20(baseToken).balanceOf(address(this)) == tokenQtys.baseTokenQty,Exchange: FEE_ON_TRANSFER_NOT_SUPPORTED) (src/contracts/Exchange.sol#134-138)
		- stale variable `REF_111`
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [Exchange.addLiquidity(uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256,address,uint256)](src/contracts/Exchange.sol#L87-L156):
	External call allowing reentrancy:
	- [IERC20(baseToken).safeTransferFrom(msg.sender,address(this),tokenQtys.baseTokenQty)](src/contracts/Exchange.sol#L127-L131)
	Balance read before the call:
	- [tokenQtys = MathLib.calculateAddLiquidityQuantities(_baseTokenQtyDesired,_quoteTokenQtyDesired,_baseTokenQtyMin,_quoteTokenQtyMin,IERC20(baseToken).balanceOf(address(this)),IERC20(quoteToken).balanceOf(address(this)),this.totalSupply(),internalBalances)](src/contracts/Exchange.sol#L97-L107)
	Possible stale balance used after the call in a condition:
	- [require(bool,string)(IERC20(baseToken).balanceOf(address(this)) == tokenQtys.baseTokenQty,Exchange: FEE_ON_TRANSFER_NOT_SUPPORTED)](src/contracts/Exchange.sol#L134-L138)
		- stale variable `REF_111`

detectors.description:
MathLib.roundToNearest(uint256,uint256) (src/libraries/MathLib.sol#50-56) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- ((a + (n / 2)) / n) * n (src/libraries/MathLib.sol#55)
detectors.markdown:
[MathLib.roundToNearest(uint256,uint256)](src/libraries/MathLib.sol#L50-L56) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- [((a + (n / 2)) / n) * n](src/libraries/MathLib.sol#L55)

detectors.description:
Version constraint 0.8.4 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- SignedImmutables.
